coins.name: BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund
Spiko EU T-Bills Money Market Fund
Invesco Short Duration US Government Securities Fund
Janus Henderson Anemoy AAA CLO Fund
Ondo Short-Term U.S. Government Bond Fund

categories.name: Farming-as-a-Service (FaaS)
categories.content: Farming-as-a Service simplifies the process of yield farming by handling the technical aspects, such as choosing the right liquidity pools, managing the staking or lending process, and optimizing the yield.

categories.name: topblast.lol Ecosystem
categories.content: topblast.lol is a launchpad on The Open Network (TON), integrating fair-launch mechanics with a comprehensive Telegram-native DeFi ecosystem.

categories.name: Reddit Points
categories.content: Reddit Community Points are blockchain tokens that are owned and controlled by a specific Reddit community. With these point tokens, a community member can own a piece of their favorite subreddit. The points can be earned through contributions in the community such as post creation, comments, and content moderations.

categories.name: JPY Stablecoin
categories.content: A JPY stablecoin is a type of cryptocurrency that is designed to maintain a stable value by being pegged to the Japanese yen.

categories.name: bStocks Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokenized representations of U.S.-listed stocks and ETFs issued by BTech Holdings Limited, a Binance Group affiliate structured as a Special Purpose Vehicle in the Abu Dhabi Global Market.

categories.name: Cat-Themed
categories.content: Meme coins which are inspired by cat.

categories.name: Liquid Staked HYPE
categories.content: Liquid staked HYPE is a tokenized representation of staked HYPE that can be traded or used in various DeFi applications.

categories.name: Prediction Market Tools
categories.content: Cryptocurrencies representing projects that function as an application or tooling layer on top of decentralized prediction markets (like Polymarket, Kalshi etc.) to offer enhanced utilities. These platforms do not offer their own prediction bets and markets and instead leverages the liquidity, data, and settlement mechanisms of underlying prediction markets to provide enhanced user experiences, such as trading terminals, copy-trading bots, parlay engines, or social betting interfaces.

categories.name: TRY Stablecoin
categories.content: A TRY stablecoin is a type of cryptocurrency that is designed to maintain a stable value by being pegged to the Turkish lira.

categories.name: Zodiac-Themed
categories.content: Meme coins related to zodiac signs.

categories.name: Ohm Fork
categories.content: An Ohm fork is a change to the underlying code of the Olympus DAO's OHM protocol that results in a split into a separate versions of the protocol.

categories.name: Robinhood Chain Stocks Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokenized securities and RWAs natively issued or managed within the Robinhood Chain infrastructure. Operating as a compliant, financial-grade scaling network under MiFID II guidelines, this ecosystem merges conventional stock portfolios with on-chain liquidity rails. The underlying architecture connects public equities, exchange-traded products, and private venture allocations directly to decentralized wallets while streaming economic benefits like dividend equivalents to verified asset holders.

categories.name: Game Studio
categories.content: A game studio develops video games using blockchain technologies, integrating NFTs, cryptocurrencies, and smart contracts to enable player ownership and the trading of in-game assets

categories.name: Rebase Tokens
categories.content: Rebase tokens are cryptocurrencies that are usually pegged to a certain value, and they control their prices by algorithmically adjusting their token’s circulating supply.

categories.name: Nest Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokens representing permissionless and non-custodial deposits into curated Real-World Asset (RWA) vaults on the Nest protocol.

categories.name: Securitize Ecosystem
categories.content: The Securitize Ecosystem encompasses tokenized real-world assets (RWAs) issued, managed, or custodied by Securitize, Inc. and its international affiliates.

categories.name: Olympus Pro Ecosystem
categories.content: Olympus Pro designed to provide liquidity management solutions for DeFi protocols. They offers a service called "bonds-as-a-service," which allows protocols to own their liquidity by offering discounted OHM tokens in exchange for liquidity provider (LP) tokens. This helps protocols to reduce their reliance on liquidity mining incentives and gain more control over their liquidity.

categories.name: Yield Tokenization Protocol
categories.content: Yield tokenization protocol refers to protocol taking a yield-bearing asset and splitting the future yield stream out to distinct token.

categories.name: LRTfi
categories.content: LRTfi refers to DeFi protocols that are built upon Liquid Restaking Tokens, allowing users to earn additional yield from their staked assets by restaking them.

categories.name: Wrapped-Tokens
categories.content: Wrapped tokens offer a way to circumvent the lack of interoperability between different blockchains. The wrapping of a token happens when the original asset is put into a “wrapper” and deployed on a different blockchain. With it being wrapped, the cryptocurrency can now be used on a blockchain where it previously wasn’t available. One example of a wrapped token would be Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC). It is an ERC-20 version of Bitcoin, which allows it to be used on protocols based on Ethereum. Watch this video to learn more about Wrapped tokens.
